description: Machine-readable index over official/library/survey/*.json: stable instrument identity (TaskName, optional variants), version, and DOI/citation, keyed for cross-study pooling. Generated by scripts/generate_instrument_registry.py via src/instrument_registry.py; consumed at conversion time to backfill Study.Version/Study.DOI in survey sidecars whenever the converted template didn't already carry them. This is a generated data index, not a sidecar-validation target - it is loaded directly by name (schema_manager.load_schema('instrument-registry', ...)), not through load_all_schemas().

GeneratedOn.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last regeneration.

SourceLibrary.description: Repo-relative path the index was built from (e.g. official/library/survey).

Instruments.description: Keyed by TaskName (Study.TaskName, or the filename stem when TaskName is absent from the source template).

SourceFile.description: Filename of the instrument template in the source library.

DOI.description: Empty string when the source template has no DOI on file.

Version.description: Study.Version from the source template, when present.

Vocabulary.description: Optional external controlled-vocabulary reference for this instrument (NIH CDE, SNOMED, or a DOI-based URI). Not populated by the generator today - reserved for a future Neurobagel-annotation pass; present so downstream consumers have a stable place to look.
